products.name: War Room
products.description: Portfolio command center — dashboard, operations tracker, financial scoreboard, intel, and billing ledger
products.longDescription: War Room is the central command center for the entire Lexcorp portfolio. It combines a real-time operations dashboard, financial scoreboard, intel feed, and billing ledger into a single pane of glass. Use it to track project health, monitor revenue across products, and coordinate cross-portfolio decisions from one place.

products.name: GSkillPacks
products.description: Public catalog of reusable agentic workflows and skill packs for Claude Code and Codex agents
products.longDescription: GSkillPacks is a public catalog of reusable agentic workflows and skill packs designed for Claude Code and Codex agents. Browse, install, and compose pre-built skills that handle common development tasks — from code review and deployment to research and documentation. Each pack is version-controlled and designed to drop into any project with a single command.

products.name: Pitwall
products.description: AI coding subscription pacing app for Claude, Codex, Gemini, and future providers
products.longDescription: Pitwall helps developers pace their AI coding subscription usage across providers like Claude, Codex, and Gemini. Track your consumption in real time, set budget alerts, and avoid mid-cycle overages. The local edition runs from source with a monorepo architecture designed for a future connected edition with opt-in cloud sync and team cost dashboards.

products.name: Bismarck AI
products.description: Game-experiment platform where players play Walreign Empire web games that trigger real development work
products.longDescription: Bismarck AI is a game-experiment platform where players interact with the Walreign Empire — a persistent browser-based strategy world whose in-game actions trigger real software development work. It blends gaming with AI-driven orchestration, turning player decisions into engineering tasks managed by the Moltke engine. Think of it as a living product lab disguised as a strategy game.

products.name: Draft Stonk
products.description: Fantasy football for stocks — league creation, draft setup, real-time pricing, and social features
products.longDescription: Draft Stonk applies fantasy sports mechanics to the stock market. Create leagues, invite friends, and draft stocks competitively in a turn-based format with real-time pricing. Compete on portfolio performance over a season with leaderboards, trash talk, and social features — all the fun of fantasy football, but with equities instead of quarterbacks.

products.name: calcLLM
products.description: LLM cost intelligence platform with hidden multiplier modeling, provider sync, and team sharing
products.longDescription: calcLLM is a cost intelligence platform that reveals the true cost of running LLM workloads. It models hidden multipliers like caching, retries, and token overhead that providers don't surface in their pricing pages. Sync billing data across providers, share dashboards with your team, and forecast spend before it surprises you.

products.name: Next Level Startup
products.description: Customer-discovery OS for technical B2B SaaS founders — workspace, experiments, evidence, and proof
products.longDescription: Next Level Startup is a customer-discovery operating system built for technical B2B SaaS founders. Structure your assumptions, design experiments, collect evidence from real conversations, and build a public proof page that shows investors you've done the work. Ships with private workspaces, claim review workflows, and pricing-readiness hooks to guide you from idea to paid conversion.

products.name: VectorFit
products.description: AI-powered raster-to-vector conversion for Glowforge, xTool, and Cricut fabricators
products.longDescription: VectorFit converts raster images into clean vector files optimized for laser cutters and craft machines like Glowforge, xTool, and Cricut. Upload a PNG or JPEG, and the AI pipeline traces, simplifies, and exports production-ready SVGs. Available on web and desktop with a complete conversion funnel and Stripe-powered billing.

products.name: JIT Life OS
products.description: Exception-first subscription management for recurring-spend cleanup
products.longDescription: JIT Life OS takes an exception-first approach to subscription management — instead of listing every recurring charge, it surfaces the ones that need attention right now. Flag renewals you forgot about, catch price increases before they hit, and clean up recurring spend without auditing every line item. Built for people who want to manage subscriptions by exception, not by spreadsheet.

products.name: gBlockParty
products.description: Content platform aggregating coding tutorials, weekly AI/dev recaps, and weekly episodes
products.longDescription: gBlockParty is a content platform that brings together coding tutorials, weekly AI and developer news recaps, and episodic programming content. Whether you're learning new skills, staying current on the latest in AI and software development, or following along with recurring series, gBlockParty curates and delivers the content developers care about most.

products.name: PulseBoard
products.description: Slack-native burnout detection — dashboard, check-ins, alerts, AI digests, and billing
products.longDescription: PulseBoard detects early signs of team burnout directly inside Slack. It runs lightweight check-ins, analyzes response patterns with AI, and surfaces risk signals on a manager dashboard before they become retention problems. Automated alerts, weekly AI digests, and email summaries keep leadership informed without adding meeting overhead.

products.name: Metternich Engine
products.description: Browser game engine platform with AI generation, marketplace, collaboration, and analytics
products.longDescription: Metternich Engine is a browser-based game engine platform that lets creators build, publish, and monetize web games without leaving the browser. It includes AI-assisted game generation, a creator marketplace, real-time collaboration tools, and built-in analytics. Designed to power the game experiences inside the Bismarck AI ecosystem and beyond.

products.name: WarranIT
products.description: IT asset inventory with custom fields, RBAC, CSV import/export, full-text search, and audit trails
products.longDescription: WarranIT is an IT asset inventory system built for teams that have outgrown spreadsheets but don't need a full ITSM suite. Track hardware, software licenses, and warranties with custom fields, role-based access control, and complete audit trails. Import and export via CSV, search across your entire inventory instantly, and keep compliance documentation in one place.

products.name: FormForge
products.description: AI form builder with drag-and-drop editing, conditional logic, submissions, and 10 field types
products.longDescription: FormForge is an AI-powered form builder that turns a plain-language prompt into a working form with drag-and-drop editing. Choose from 10 field types, add conditional logic to show or hide sections, and collect submissions — all without writing code. Ideal for surveys, intake forms, and feedback collection where speed matters more than a full survey platform.

products.name: SnipVault
products.description: Cloud code snippet manager with AI tagging, semantic search, Gist import, and VS Code extension
products.longDescription: SnipVault is a cloud-based code snippet manager that uses AI to auto-tag and organize your saved code. Search semantically by what a snippet does rather than its exact syntax, import existing GitHub Gists in bulk, and access your library from the VS Code extension without leaving your editor. Built for developers who accumulate useful patterns and want them findable later.

products.name: DriftLog
products.description: AI changelog platform with GitHub/GitLab webhooks, release management, and email digests
products.longDescription: DriftLog turns your git history into polished, user-facing changelogs automatically. Connect GitHub or GitLab via webhooks, and DriftLog uses AI to summarize commits into readable release notes. Manage releases, schedule announcements, and send email digests to keep users informed about what shipped — without writing changelog entries by hand.

products.name: Poketo
products.description: Agent-first operations suite for small agencies — CRM, Growth, and cross-app agent foundations
products.longDescription: Poketo is an agent-first operations suite designed for small agencies and solo operators. Instead of clicking through dashboards, you describe what you need and AI agents handle the CRM updates, growth campaigns, and cross-app coordination. It bundles Poke CRM and Poke Growth into a unified platform where agents do the busywork and you make the decisions.

products.name: Poke CRM
products.description: Contact management, deal pipeline, and billing follow-up module within the Poketo agent suite
products.longDescription: Poke CRM is the contact and deal management module within the Poketo agent suite. Manage contacts, track deals through a visual pipeline, and let AI agents handle billing follow-ups and outreach scheduling. It's a lightweight CRM that punches above its weight because the agent layer automates the repetitive data entry and follow-up tasks that bog down small teams.

products.name: Poke Growth
products.description: Growth automation and analytics module within the Poketo agent suite
products.longDescription: Poke Growth is the growth automation and analytics module within the Poketo agent suite. Define growth experiments, automate outreach sequences, and track conversion metrics — all orchestrated by AI agents that adapt based on results. Designed to give small agencies and solo operators the growth ops capabilities that usually require a dedicated team.

products.name: CheckGres
products.description: Municipal government efficiency scoring for journalists — city pages, exports, historical trends, and embeds
products.longDescription: CheckGres scores municipal government efficiency and makes the data accessible to journalists and civic researchers. Browse city-level pages with efficiency metrics, export datasets for your own analysis, track historical trends over time, and embed interactive charts in articles. Built to bring transparency to local government operations through data-driven reporting.

products.name: GIGACHADD
products.description: CLI-first adversarial AI debate system with debate, duel, roast, review, and compare commands
products.longDescription: GIGACHADD is a CLI-first adversarial AI debate system powered by a Rust debate engine. Pit AI models against each other in structured debates, head-to-head duels, code roasts, and side-by-side comparisons — all from your terminal. Use it to stress-test prompts, evaluate model reasoning, or just watch two LLMs argue about whether tabs are better than spaces.

products.name: Spellbook OS
products.description: Full-lifecycle content operating system for creator-operators — six modules covering planning-to-analytics
products.longDescription: Spellbook OS is a full-lifecycle content operating system for creator-operators who produce across multiple channels. Six integrated modules — Sanctum, Foresight, Prism, Ritual, Portals, and Scry — cover the entire loop from content planning and brand management through AI-powered multiplication, approval workflows, multi-channel publishing, and performance analytics.

products.name: Moltke
products.description: AI orchestration engine powering Bismarck's workspace management and multi-agent task routing
products.longDescription: Moltke is the AI orchestration engine that powers Bismarck AI's workspace management, code generation pipelines, and multi-agent task routing. It coordinates multiple AI agents working in parallel, routes tasks to the right model for the job, and manages the feedback loops between game events and engineering work. The strategic brain behind the Bismarck ecosystem.

products.name: SpaceNext
products.description: Professional-grade orbital mechanics sim with interactive tutorials and scenario engine
products.longDescription: SpaceNext is a professional-grade orbital mechanics simulator that runs entirely in the browser. Learn rocket science through interactive tutorials that teach real physics — from Hohmann transfers to gravity assists — then design and test your own missions in the scenario engine. New scenarios are added via data files, no code changes required.

products.name: B4
products.description: Boston startup community platform — events, blog, founder and investor portals, sponsorship, and resources
products.longDescription: B4 (Boston for Builders) is a community platform connecting Boston-area startup founders, investors, and operators. Browse upcoming events, read the community blog, access dedicated founder and investor portals, and discover local resources and sponsorship opportunities. Built to strengthen the Boston startup ecosystem by making connections and information easier to find.

products.name: Boston Founder Radio
products.description: Podcast and video platform for Boston founders — archived before billing was implemented
products.longDescription: Boston Founder Radio was a podcast and video platform dedicated to telling the stories of Boston-area founders. The SDK and schema foundation shipped, but the project was archived before membership billing went live. The content and planning work remain available as a reference for future media projects in the Boston startup community.

products.name: PMF Hunt
products.description: Owned domain awaiting mission assignment — held in reserve
products.longDescription: PMF Hunt is a reserved domain and brand identity held for a future product focused on product-market fit discovery. No codebase or active development exists yet — it's parked in the portfolio as a strategic placeholder awaiting the right mission assignment.

products.name: Loadoutworks
products.description: Visual firearm builder and community — killed after payment-provider restrictions
products.longDescription: Loadoutworks was a visual firearm configurator and enthusiast community. Users could build custom loadouts with an interactive parts picker and share configurations with the community. The project was killed after payment processors restricted firearms-adjacent commerce — a hard lesson in validating payment-provider policies before building in regulated verticals.

products.name: Sanctum
products.description: Spellbook OS workspace hub — health, next actions, queue pressure, and connector status
products.longDescription: Sanctum is the workspace hub module of Spellbook OS. It provides a single dashboard showing system health, your next prioritized actions, publishing queue pressure, and the connection status of all linked channels. Think of it as mission control for your content operation — one glance tells you what needs attention right now.

products.name: Foresight
products.description: Spellbook OS planning module — brands, campaigns, shows, episodes, and channel-intent capture
products.longDescription: Foresight is the planning module of Spellbook OS. Organize your content strategy across brands, campaigns, shows, and episodes with built-in channel-intent capture that maps each piece to its target platforms from the start. It ensures every content idea has a plan before it hits production.

products.name: Prism
products.description: Spellbook OS multiplication module — one source asset becomes many channel-native outputs
products.longDescription: Prism is the content multiplication module of Spellbook OS. Feed in one source asset — a long-form video, blog post, or podcast episode — and Prism uses AI to generate channel-native variants for every platform in your distribution plan. One recording becomes a Twitter thread, LinkedIn post, YouTube Short, newsletter excerpt, and more.

products.name: Ritual
products.description: Spellbook OS approval and publishing queue — review, schedule, publish, retry, and export
products.longDescription: Ritual is the approval and publishing queue module of Spellbook OS. Review AI-generated content variants, approve or edit them, schedule publication times, and push to all connected channels in one go. Failed publishes can be retried, and everything is exportable for archival or compliance. The last gate between creation and the audience.

products.name: Portals
products.description: Spellbook OS channels module — destination accounts, provider setup, and token health
products.longDescription: Portals is the channels module of Spellbook OS. Connect your publishing destinations — YouTube, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, newsletters, and more — configure provider credentials, and monitor token health and API quotas in one place. It's the integration layer that ensures Ritual can publish reliably to every platform in your distribution plan.

products.name: Scry
products.description: Spellbook OS analytics module — performance, patterns, recommendations, and feedback loop
products.longDescription: Scry is the analytics module of Spellbook OS. Track content performance across all connected channels, identify patterns in what resonates with your audience, and get AI-powered recommendations for improving reach and engagement. The feedback loop feeds insights back into Foresight's planning, closing the strategy-to-measurement cycle.
